title: Restore and update cto-trust-ops tests for new trust-state architecture
body: tests/unit/cto-trust-ops.spec.ts was deleted because it tested the old staff-keyed trust-ops API which no longer exists. The ops (graduateAction, degradeAction, resetAction, summarizeTrust) now live in trust-state.ts. Someone should write equivalent tests against the new TrustManifest/TrustDutyView types if test coverage is desired.
rationale: The test file was removed because its imports (trust-ops.ts) no longer exist. Without tests, there's no automated verification that the trust management ops work correctly.
